symptoms.symptom_name: Non-reducible retracted foreskin trapped behind the coronal sulcus

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A retracted foreskin that cannot be brought forward and is trapped behind the corona is the definition of paraphimosis.

symptoms.symptom_name: Dusky/purple, tense, swollen glans (ischaemic colour change)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Dusky discolouration signals compromised perfusion and impending necrosis — the time-critical driver.
Progressive glans oedema/discolouration is the expected consequence of the tourniquet ring.

symptoms.symptom_name: Severe penile pain, intolerant of any contact

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Exquisite pain accompanies acute strangulating oedema of the glans; severity tracks urgency.

symptoms.symptom_name: Constricting oedematous preputial ring ('inner tube' of swollen mucosa)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: The oedematous constricting band proximal to the glans is the classic examination sign — requires direct visualisation, not available via telehealth.

symptoms.symptom_name: Flaccid penile shaft (engorgement isolated to glans/prepuce)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A flaccid shaft excludes priapism; engorgement confined to the glans/trapped prepuce points to paraphimosis.

symptoms.symptom_name: Dense white scarred/fibrotic preputial ring (background phimosis / suspected lichen sclerosus)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A scarred tight preputial ring predisposes to entrapment and paraphimosis and drives the need for definitive circumcision.

symptoms.symptom_name: Preserved micturition (bladder not palpable, no retention)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Ongoing voiding and a non-palpable bladder indicate retention has not yet developed — must still be safety-netted as a possible progression.

symptoms.symptom_name: Glans not blackened and no foul discharge (necrosis not yet established)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Absence of frank necrosis keeps the reduction window open, but does not lower the emergency tier.
